package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_trimleft_space_trimspace: `strings.TrimLeft(..., whitespace)` instead of `strings.TrimSpace(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario673Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.TrimLeft(haystack, " \t\n") == needle
}
